title: neanotis calycina
intro: Neanotis calycina, also known as the Indian squill, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neanotis calycina include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. Neanotis calycina is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of ailments.
